input_schema.hcom_message_example: hcom send --name <sender> "@research-pipeline-claude-7 format: <input_id>; input=outputs/<input_id>/04_synthesize/v1.json; schema=schemas/05_format.json; write v1.json + v1.md then report to @research-pipeline-claude-6"

process.description: Build v1.json per schemas/05_format.json using the field-mapping. summary <- 04_synthesize.summary; entities <- 02_extract.entities (deduped by name); facts <- 02_extract.facts (top 10-20 by confidence, flatten to {claim, source}); analysis.themes/gaps/contradictions <- 03_analyze (one-line each); insights <- 04_synthesize.insights[].insight (flatten to string[]); diagrams/theses <- 04_synthesize (verbatim); references <- 01_ingest source_ref + cited URLs + 00_research.sources[].url.
Render v1.md using the Markdown template. The formatter ADDS the ```mermaid wrapper (the 04_synthesize.diagrams[].code does NOT include it).
Write v1.md via write_artifact with ext='md'.
If critic passes: call tools.manifest.finalize(input_id). Report done to @orch. If critic fails: do NOT call finalize.

output_schema.markdown_template:
# Research Report: <TOPIC or first 80 chars of summary>

## Summary
<summary>

## Key Insights
- <insight 1>
- <insight 2>

## Entities
| Name | Type | Mentions |
|---|---|---|
| Google | org | 4 |

## Facts
- <claim> -- _<evidence_quote>_

## Analysis
### Themes
- **<theme name>** -- <description>
### Gaps
- Gap: <description> (would need: <what_would_fill_it>)
### Contradictions
- Contradiction: <claim_a> <-> <claim_b> -- <explanation>

## Diagrams
### <diagram title>
<description, if any>
```mermaid
<Mermaid code -- formatter adds the wrapper>
```

## Theses
### Thesis 1: <statement>
**Confidence:** <level>
**Evidence:**
- <evidence 1>
**Counterarguments:**
- <counterargument 1>

## References
- <url 1>
- <url 2>

examples.lifted_from: real v1.json and render_md() output for the QEC topic

artifact.summary: Quantum error correction crossed industrial viability in 2026 with 1000+ logical qubits via surface codes, but overhead and decoding latency remain critical bottlenecks.

themes.name: surface code dominance
themes.description: Surface codes are the de facto industrial QEC

contradictions.claim_b: Industrial practice still uses 1000:1 physical-to-logical ratio
contradictions.explanation: Decoding overhead and syndrome measurement costs may offset theoretical savings

insights: Surface codes are the de facto standard for 2026 industrial QEC

diagrams.title: QEC Pipeline
diagrams.code:
flowchart LR
  A[Physical Qubits] --> B[Surface Code Encoding]
  B --> C[Stabilizer Measurements]
  C --> D[Real-time Decoder]
  D --> E[Logical Qubit]

theses.statement: Surface codes will dominate industrial QEC for the next 3-5 years
counterarguments: Color codes have better transversal gate sets

self_check.check: All required fields in v1.json (summary, entities, facts, analysis, insights, references, diagrams, theses)
Every field in v1.json traces to one of: 04_synthesize, 02_extract, 03_analyze, 01_ingest (no invented content)
facts[] has 10-20 entries (filtered by confidence if more)
insights[] is string[] (not array of objects)
Mermaid wrappers in v1.md (the v1.json code field is unwrapped)
Title H1 = <title or first 80 chars of summary> (per agents/formatter/AGENT.md:109)
JSON <-> Markdown agree; no new facts in Markdown
After critic pass: tools.manifest.finalize(input_id) is called
On critic fail: do NOT call finalize

common_failures.failure: diagrams missing the Mermaid wrapper in v1.md
Markdown has new facts not in JSON
common_failures.fix: Remove; only prose polish is allowed
Re-check field mapping; ensure every field traces to upstream

failure_modes.name: Missing upstream artifact
failure_modes.handling: Halt. Do not produce a partial report. Tell @orch which stage failed.

failure_modes.name: Title is empty
failure_modes.handling: Use the first 80 chars of summary as the H1.

failure_modes.name: Mermaid code missing ```mermaid wrapper in v1.md
failure_modes.handling: Wrap it. (The v1.json code field is unwrapped; only v1.md wraps.)

failure_modes.name: Critic fails 05_format
failure_modes.handling: Do NOT call finalize; orchestrator will retry. The manifest stays winner='' for 05_format until the next pass.

refactor_delta.current_state: Full Markdown template + field-mapping in this spec's Process + Output schema sections.
refactor_delta.target_state: All process detail stays in this spec; the formatter's JSON contract is the only agent truth.
concrete_steps: Keep the Markdown template in this spec's Output schema (already moved).
Keep the field-mapping in this spec's Process step 2 (already moved).
Consider adding a JSON Schema for v1.md (Mermaid-block count >= 1 if 04_synthesize.diagrams[] is non-empty). New schema-as-lint check.
